meta.description: General backend logic and architecture issues

default.title: Establish backend folder structure
default.body: Set up the core directory structure including `routes`, `controllers`, `models`, and `middlewares`.

default.title: Configure environment variables handling
default.body: Set up `dotenv` or an equivalent config module to manage secrets carefully across different environments.

info-required.title: Decide on database architecture
info-required.body: Evaluate and document whether to use a SQL (e.g., PostgreSQL) or NoSQL (e.g., MongoDB) database for the project.
